synopsis: A slow crane ascend reveals a colossal, ancient living tree structure stretching into the clouds, its massive branches adorned with countless tiny, glowing dwelling-pods connected by delicate bridges.

shots.prompt: A slow crane ascend begins from ground level, looking up at the base of an impossibly colossal, ancient tree, its trunk wider than a skyscraper, disappearing into a dense, misty canopy high above. The bark is textured with deep greens and browns, covered in luminous moss. Tiny, glowing lanterns hang from delicate ropes, marking a hidden path leading up into the tree's immense roots. Volumetric fog drifts through the lower branches.

The crane ascend continues smoothly, rising higher into the colossal tree. The camera now reveals a sprawling network of immense branches, each as thick as a mountain ridge. Perched among these branches are countless tiny, glowing spherical dwelling-pods, connected by intricate, illuminated rope bridges. Warm amber light spills from their windows, creating a vibrant contrast against the deep green foliage and the lavender fog that surrounds the upper reaches of the tree. Distant, silhouetted figures can be seen moving across the bridges.

music: An organic, soaring orchestral piece for woodwinds and strings. Features a melancholic oboe melody over a bed of sustained, gentle string chords and delicate, plucked cello notes, evoking growth and ancient life. A slow tempo (40 BPM) builds in warmth and complexity as the tree-city is revealed, reaching a gentle, hopeful peak before settling into a soft, ethereal resolution.
